name: Gold Floral Filigree Pendant Mangalsutra
description: This elegant mangalsutra features a stunning gold pendant with delicate floral filigree and fine beadwork. Its timeless design with multiple strands of black beads offers a sophisticated look perfect for special occasions.

name: Classic Gold Franco Link Chain
description: A classic and versatile gold link chain, this piece is perfect for everyday wear or layering with pendants. The sturdy Franco link design offers a polished finish and a timeless appeal.

name: Diamond Cluster Pendant & Chain
description: This elegant diamond cluster pendant is set in warm yellow gold and presented on a diamond-accented chain, featuring a delicate floral-inspired setting that beautifully catches the light.

name: Majestic Ruby & Pearl Heritage Choker Set
description: Elevate your bridal or festive look with this exquisite heritage jewelry ensemble. Features a stunning choker necklace crafted with multiple strands of pearls and ornate gold-toned motifs set with vibrant pink stones.

name: Regal Mandala Filigree Necklace Set
description: Inspired by traditional Indian artistry, this piece features a magnificent, oversized circular mandala pendant with intricate floral filigree work, paired with matching earrings for a grand statement.

name: Grand Heritage Filigree Bridal Set
description: The central piece is adorned with cascading gold tassels that create a beautiful sense of movement and luxury. Paired with matching long drop earrings, this set captures the essence of royal heritage.

name: Regal Emerald & Pearl Heritage Choker Set
description: Exude timeless grace with this exquisitely designed choker composed of multiple strands of lustrous pearls, beautifully punctuated by five ornate gold-toned square panels set with deep green stones.
